flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Durham Technical Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (9.2% → 8.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Durham Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Durham Technical Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 3.9k).
